_comment: Hashharness schema fragment for the tracer skill (Layer 1).
set_schema REPLACES the effective type set with a full snapshot — it does
NOT merge. So MERGE these four types into the current get_schema() map and
submit the ENTIRE set (expected_prev = current head). Submitting only these
four would wipe every other skill's types from the head. See SKILL.md Step 1.
They coexist with the AIF four (AifInode/AifRA/AifCA/AifPA).
Layer-2 connascence kind keys (CoN, CoI, ...) are NOT defined here — they
live as opaque strings in attributes.kind on TraceConn items and are

TraceSymbol._purpose: A function/method definition — the target of calls (static spine).

TraceToken._purpose: A passed/returned value. identity is run-scoped; value_hash is cross-run.

TraceStep._purpose: A call site (static) or an invocation (dynamic). caller=dynamic tree; in_symbol=static spine; realizes joins them.

TraceConn._purpose: A detected connascence (overlay). elements = the coupled nodes; degree = len(elements).
